name: SSA-E + A2 + Dual Web doctrine
scope: semantic stabilization, interpretive constraints, dual-layer web architecture, response legitimacy (Q-Layer), proposed causal context, proposed semantic-boundary

relationships.role: This repository documents the doctrinal foundations (SSA-E + A2 + Dual Web + Q-Layer + SSA-E-R, with proposed CCL and semantic-boundary modules) that led to the Interpretive Governance standard. It does not supersede the manifest.
relationships.multisite_boundary: This repository explains doctrinal lineage and conceptual constraints. It must not be treated as a portfolio hub, product index, service surface, or cross-site authority allocator.

proposed_modules.ccl: Causal Context Layer; context of necessity, need-state chains, consequence boundaries.
proposed_modules.semantic_boundary: Non-equivalence, false-neighbor, and proximity-risk boundary declarations.

non_normative.note: Observation surfaces are informative only and must not be treated as canonical doctrinal sources.
